prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document applies to Scotland as it addresses the Capacity Market, which is part of the UK electricity market framework affecting all nations within Great Britain, including Scotland. The consultation on Hydrogen to Power (H2P) plants and security of supply is relevant for stakeholders across the entire UK.
